summary: A Go-based orchestration runner with MCP integration, heavily utilizing automated agent-driven test generation.
concerns: high volume of auto-generated extra tests (GOrchestra/glm-agents) polluting the repository structure
potential test flakiness from extensive assertion wiring
unclear boundary between core logic and generated test scaffolding
suggestions: move GOrchestra agent artifacts to a separate isolated directory or .gitignore
consolidate overlapping extra test files to reduce maintenance burden
document the MCP handler integration points
